# Every Content Wiki

A knowledge base curated from Blair's Every.to content, following the LLM Wiki pattern.

## Core Resources
- [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md): Schema and instructions for agents.
- [wiki/index.md](wiki/index.md): Master catalog of knowledge.
- [wiki/log.md](wiki/log.md): Activity log.
- [wiki/status.md](wiki/status.md): Repository health and coverage.

## Knowledge Structure
- [Levels of AI Adoption](wiki/concepts/levels-of-ai-adoption.md): 8-level framework by Mike Taylor & Laura Entis.
- [Loops vs Prompts](wiki/concepts/loops-vs-prompts.md): Workflow optimization strategy.
- [Writing Guardrails](wiki/concepts/writing-guardrails.md): Quality control for AI content.
- [Out of Scope](wiki/meta/out-of-scope.md): Topics excluded from this wiki.

## Directory Mapping
- `raw/`: Source articles and transcripts.
- `wiki/concepts/`: Frameworks and methodologies.
- `wiki/entities/`: Tools, people, and organizations.
- `wiki/summaries/`: Source-specific summaries.
- `wiki/meta/`: Governance and scope.

## Agent Instructions
This repository is optimized for LLM ingestion. Use `wiki/index.md` as the entry point for research and `CLAUDE.md` for formatting rules.
